KJ

SCHOOL OF COMPUTATIONAL AND PHYSICAL SCIENCES

DEPARTMENT OF COMPUTER SCIENCE

O R G A N I S E S

KRISTU JAYANTI | DEPARTMENT OF COMPUTER SCIENCE

NATIONAL TEENS HACKATHON FOR PARTICIPANTS AGED 13-18

WHERE CREATIVITY MEETS TECHNOLOGY THROUGH HANDS-ON BUILDING,
GUIDED CHALLENGES, AND INTENSE STARTUP EXPERIENCES

JOIN US ON APRIL 11TH 2026

Build Cool Projects, Win Cool Rewards

Skyfall is a beginner-friendly hackathon for students, where curious minds come together to explore, build and create. It offers a space where technologists, designers, and builders collaborate to turn ideas into real projects.

BUILD WHATEVER YOU LIKE!

You don't need to know how to code. You don't need experience. If you have an idea, you can build it. You’ll have the leadership of some of India’s best mentors and innovators.

BUILD WHATEVER YOU LIKE!

Explorative Skyfall through interactive side-quests across the campus, turning your journey into a game. Complete quests, win XP, and unlock secrets for bonuses and prizes while you build!

WHAT TO BUILD ?

SOFTWARE

Build apps, websites, or anything digital. Got an idea? Turn it into something people can actually use.

HARDWARE

Build gadgets. Make stuff that moves, reacts, and exists in real life.

COMBINATION

Why choose one? Mix both. Build something where hardware + software work together and do work really cool.

NOT SURE WHERE TO START?

Use the Idea Generator to get silly ideas to make a fun project in a few hours, then start your build.

Click on generate to generate an idea.....

GOT STUCK ? CALL A MENTOR

We know that sometimes you get stuck, and that is completely normal, especially if it's your first time. We totally understand that.

At Skyfall, we have 10+ mentors, including past record-breaking hackathon winners, ready to guide you through every step of hacking.

10+MENTORS
READY

AGENDA

07:30 AM - 08:30 AMDoors Open
09:00 AM - 10:00 AMOpening Ceremony
10:00 AM - 01:00 PMHacking Begins
01:00 PM - 02:00 PMLunch Break
03:00 PM - 04:00 PMActivity : Will be revealed later
04:00 PM - 05:00 PMMentoring Sessions
05:00 PM - 06:00 PMPolishing Projects and Submissions
06:00 PM - 07:00 PMJudging + Evening Snacks
07:00 PM - 08:00 PMValedictory / Closing Note

FAQ

Who is eligible?

Skyfall is for highschoolers! You need to be 13-18 years old to participate.

Will food be provided?

Yes, meals and snacks will be provided. We will arrange any food sensitivities to the best of our ability.

My parents are concerned..

We're here to help! They can reach out to us at contact@skyfall.live for any questions.

What do I need to bring?

Your laptop, charger, and an open mind! Rest we are taking care of everything.

Can beginners participate?

Skyfall is for all skill levels! We'll have activities and quests, so join us and enjoy your weekend.

It's free?

Yes! Skyfall is completely free for all participants.

Limited Seats Available !

Seats are limited, and they're filling faster than we imagined, so if you're here, this is your moment to join us for an experience to remember.

DEPARTMENT OF
COMPUTER SCIENCE

With a legacy spanning over two decades, the Department of Computer Science (UG) at Kristu Jayanti has been a cornerstone of tech excellence.
